title: Dendrochilum graciliscapum
taxonomy: Dendrochilum graciliscapum is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the subfamily Aeridinae, a subfamily of terrestrial orchids. Dendrochilum graciliscapum further categorizes under the tribe Vandeae, which is a tribe of orchids that share similar characteristics. The genus Dendrochilum itself is part of the subtribe Dendrochiliinae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
